channel.title: Publications on Hollis Akins
channel.description: Recent content in Publications on Hollis Akins

item.title: Automated data reduction at a small college observatory
item.description: We report on our success in automating the data analysis processes for a small (half-meter class) reflecting telescope at Guilford College.

item.title: Imaging planets from imaginary worlds
item.description: For my final project for an observational astronomy class at Guilford College, I used a method called Lucky Imaging to photograph planets and incoorporate them into artistic photographs.
